title: JRZD-988 First Shooting Married Woman Document Ritsuko Sekimoto
description: "I'm sorry if I don't experience everything ..." Ritsuko Sekimoto, 48 years old. His wife, who is currently in her 20th year of marriage, is active as a picture book writer for children. After graduating from art school, got a job at a design company. Ritsuko chose to become a picture book writer for a job that is compatible with childcare when she gets married. However, the difference between ideal and reality is large ... "I was prepared to have a hard time raising children, but I'm so busy every day that I think it's such a short day while I'm doing creative activities." When I started work, there were days when I didn't meet my husband for a few days. Naturally, the chances of running a night are decreasing ... "At that time, it was masturbation while watching AV that I could quickly eliminate my libido." Ritsuko wants to take this opportunity to play something that she can't usually do. The delusion unique to the writer teacher explodes, showing the true nature of an adult woman who is not for children! !!
